title: xxFOLDxx/boot.init
summary: Linux boot automation workspace with systemd services, desktop autostart, shell scripts, cron jobs, init scripts, and config samples to start apps at boot 🐙.

title: zeittresor/talk_to_yourself
summary: Gui Ollama Agent to use Google Takeout datafiles to simulate and talk to yourself (time-travel).

title: aegisinfo/aegiscodex-
summary: Multi-model AI agent for the terminal — Claude, DeepSeek, Groq, Ollama. Council voting, semantic memory, orchestration. BYOK.

summary: Spring-Boot-Anwendung, die mit einer von Ollama lokal bereitgestellten KI Tiere in Bildern/Fotos sucht

title: iKislay/copium
summary: Context optimization layer for LLMs. 65-90% token savings with zero quality loss. Drop-in proxy for Claude, GPT, Gemini, and local LLMs (Ollama/VLLM/llama.cpp). Features KV cache-aware compression, session dedup, error cards, and Pichay-proven context paging.

title: hidetheweed11/n8n_ExecutiveBot_Platform
summary: Amin's Smart Telegram Bot integrates Docker, Ollama, and Gemini AI for seamless communication. Enhance your Telegram experience with advanced AI capabilities. 🤖🌟

title: Kakz/prometheus-llm
summary: PrometheusLLM is a unique transformer architecture inspired by dignity and recursion. This project aims to explore new frontiers in AI research and welcomes contributions from the community. 🐙🌟

title: bielz09/Enhanced-HIBP-Checker
summary: Python application that uses local Ollama LLM models to give advice on results found from HIBP (Have I Been Pwned) API

title: ot4ank/auto-openwebui
summary: A bash script to automate running Open WebUI on Linux systems with Ollama and Cloudflare via Docker

title: muhammadumar321/AushuAIAgent
summary: Local-first open-source developer AI agent. CLI + browser UI with multi-provider LLM support (Ollama, OpenAI, etc.). Privacy-focused alternative to Cursor, Copilot, and Codex.

title: ricardozmt/claude-in-your-pocket
summary: OpenClaude 2026: AI Coding Agent in Your Pocket – No Server, No PC

title: toolpack-ai/toolpack-sdk
summary: The Toolpack SDK is a unified TypeScript SDK for building AI-powered applications. It provides a single, consistent API to work with multiple AI providers OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, and Ollama without vendor lock-in.

title: Mfrostbutter/ageniusdesk-ce
summary: The command center for n8n automation operators: multi-instance management, real-time error tracking, AI-assisted debugging, a Code Lab, and one-click container deployment. Self-hosted, source-available (MIT).

title: akatzmann/slash-agent
summary: Native LLM Copilot for Your Terminal – **No Daemons. Zero Idle Memory. 100% On-Demand.**

title: Vaish1005/MEDLENS
summary: Multi-Agent Clinical Evidence Intelligence System using RAG and LLM-powered clinical reasoning.

title: NorthlandPositronics/Cogtrix
summary: About Modular AI assistant — 60 built-in tools, multi-provider LLM support (Ollama, OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini), hybrid memory, WhatsApp/Telegram daemon mode

title: pavstev/Sapat
summary: Menu bar app that turns Serbian speech into polished English — on-device with WhisperKit, optional local Ollama polish.
